title: Reis Pixelmon
description: Come to the best Pixelmon server in the world! Let's have fun and go on this adventure together.
body:
![Painel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45a1081fed67790bb0133dd016f91f98e658f583.jpeg)
Welcome to ReisPixelmon! The place where you'll find the best community in Brazil! ✨

# What does your modpack add?
Our modpack was created with the aim of making it easier for you to access our server, complementing the mods that are essential for playing with us and improving your gaming experience.

# What features does it have?
As mentioned, it contains the essentials for a satisfactory experience on our server, including the main Pixelmon mod, and the complementary JEI and JourneyMap mods.

# Why would a user want to download it? 
Our main focus is to offer a better experience by delivering the modpack with the right mods and appropriate settings to be able to play even on mobile devices, such as POJAV, since most players have difficulties setting up and playing.

Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
